bug_locations.reason: The XSRF version-2 cookie decoding logic mixes byte/string handling and may incorrectly parse masked tokens. This can cause valid XSRF tokens to be rejected during websocket-related requests.

The XSRF validation path depends on token extraction and decoding behavior that may mishandle websocket or header-based requests. Failures here would surface as authentication or handshake errors in websocket tests.
